structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU Heating Mode Sequence
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Supply Fan Speed and Supply Air Temperature Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: FCU heating coil, supply fan, cooling coil
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When a heating coil exists and zone state is Heating, fan speed and supply air temperature setpoint are controlled based on the heating-loop signal. Heating coil modulates to SATsp; cooling coil is off.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating coil present AND Zone State is Heating.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: For loop signal 100%-50%, FANsp resets from MaxHeatSpeed to MinHeatSpeed; for 50%-0%, FANsp=MinHeatSpeed. For 100%-50%, SATsp=Heat_SAT; for 50%-0%, SATsp resets from Heat_SAT to zone heating setpoint. Heating coil modulates to SATsp via PID. Cooling coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. If there is a heating coil, when Zone State  is Heating
1. For a heating -loop signal of 100% to 50%, FANsp is reset from MaxHeatSpeed to
MinHeatSpeed.
2. For a heating -loop signal of 50% to 0%, FANsp  is MinHeatSpeed.
3. For a heating -loop signal of 100% to 50%, SATsp is Heat_SAT.
4. For a heating -loop signal of 50% to 0%, SATsp is reset from Heat_SAT to the active zone
heating setpoint.
5. The heating coil shall be  modulated with a PID loop to maintain the discharge temperature
at SATsp .
6. Cooling coil OFF

evidence_quote:
a. If there is a heating coil, when Zone State  is Heating
1. For a heating -loop signal of 100% to 50%, FANsp is reset from MaxHeatSpeed to
MinHeatSpeed.
2. For a heating -loop signal of 50% to 0%, FANsp  is MinHeatSpeed.
3. For a heating -loop signal of 100% to 50%, SATsp is Heat_SAT.
4. For a heating -loop signal of 50% to 0%, SATsp is reset from Heat_SAT to the active zone
heating setpoint.
5. The heating coil shall be  modulated with a PID loop to maintain the discharge temperature
at SATsp .
6. Cooling coil OFF
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not verbatim in any chunk

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU Deadband Mode Sequence
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Supply Fan Speed and Supply Air Temperature Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: FCU supply fan, cooling coil, heating coil
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When zone state is Deadband, fan speed is set to DeadbandSpeed (shut off if zero); cooling and heating coils are OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: FANsp = DeadbandSpeed; if DeadbandSpeed=0, shut fan off. Cooling coil OFF, Heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
b. When Zone State  is Deadband
1. FANsp shall be DeadbandSpeed.  If DeadbandSpeed is zero, shut the fan off.
2. Cooling coil OFF
3. Heating coil OFF

evidence_quote:
b. When Zone State  is Deadband
1. FANsp shall be DeadbandSpeed.  If DeadbandSpeed is zero, shut the fan off.
2. Cooling coil OFF
3. Heating coil OFF

structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:

1. FC#1: Too many changes in OS
